title: Workload Type
description: Defines a Workload Type. All Workload Type definitions, either preset or user defined, must match this format.

addl_full_dedup_rate.description: Dedup rate for additional full backups.  This is a percentage value expressed in decimal (0.1 -> 10%, etc.)

annual_growth_rate.description: Year-over-year growth rate of FETB.  This is a percentage value expressed in decimal (0.1 -> 10%, etc.)

daily_change_rate.description: Daily change rate.  This is a percentage value expressed in decimal (0.1 -> 10%, etc.)

dedup_rate.description: Dedup rate.  This is a percentage value expressed in decimal (0.1 -> 10%, etc.)

initial_dedup_rate.description: Initial dedup rate.  This is a percentage value expressed in decimal (0.1 -> 10%, etc.)

log_backup_capable.description: Whether this workload type is able to do log backups.
